type-systems.title: Gradual typing - Wikipedia
type-systems.description: Gradual typing is a type system that lies in between static typing and dynamic typing. Gradual typing can easily be integrated into the type system of an object-oriented language that already uses the subsumption rule to allow implicit upcasts with respect to subtyping.
